company.name: finetuners.ai
company.notes: Generative AI boutique. Small but specialized.

research.status_summary: Operational but low-profile; no layoffs, acquisition, or formal hiring announcements detected as of June 2026 — company appears to be quietly active in a bootstrapped, boutique capacity.
research.hiring_policy: No public job postings or visa/remote policy statements found. As a small unfunded Tel Aviv-based boutique (Tracxn: 'unfunded'), EOR or remote arrangements are unconfirmed; outreach directly to founder Dori Adar would be needed to establish terms.
recent_news: Founder/CEO Dori Adar posted a LinkedIn teaser ('New office. Big news coming soon. Stay tuned. #finetuners') — timing unclear but signals activity, not shutdown.
GitHub org (FinetunersAI) maintains active public repos including ComfyUI_Finetuners_Suite and a custom ComfyUI fast-group-link plugin, indicating ongoing technical development.
Company use-cases page touts AI art training for top mobile game developers — character models, event-tailored skins, live-ops asset automation — with no removal or pivot signals detected.
No appearance in Calcalist's 2026 Israeli high-tech funding round tracker, consistent with its unfunded/bootstrapped status.
research.growth_signal: Remains unfunded and founder-led since its 2022 founding in Tel Aviv, with product and GitHub activity suggesting organic growth rather than VC-backed scaling.
research.fit_for_lior: Strong overlap with Lior's Creative AI and Vibe Coder threads — finetuners.ai sits at the exact intersection of generative image models (Stable Diffusion / ComfyUI), production workflows for game studios, and hands-on AI tooling, making it a niche but well-aligned target for a creative-AI practitioner.
